epigraph.quote: Slow walking, lots of blackberries, streams & bridges, my favourite sort of walk.

per_stop.quote: We all had chocolate birthday cake.
A lovely, lovely bishop's house/palace on the river.
We arrived at the Minster just after the start of evensong. Crowds carefully shut away from Christian worship.
found delicious Blackberries in the hedges at our coffee break, which we picked for lunch.
Charles, aged 4 months, is sleeping on a folded towel on the kitchen floor, & being bathed in the sink.
Wrought iron - forges & heavy hammer pounding red hot iron into a shape.
St. Werburgh's church is falling into disrepair; it is a Redundant Church — black & white timber frame 1645
We met the family, & I asked them if they would like a photo of our picture of Arley Hall.
